content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Market is bifurcated — defensive FMCG (NESTLE, HUL) and PSU/power (MAHABANK, TORNTPOWER, ADANIPOWER) names ripping higher, while IT is getting crushed (HCLTECH -10.6%, INFY -4.7% pre-results). Book is 74% deployed with 9 CNC positions held <1 day, all near breakeven. Priority is installing proper SLs/targets on the existing book, not adding new entries. Binary INFY result event tonight and AXIS/AUBANK/ADANIPOWER/GRANULES earnings next week argue for risk management mode.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.50,
      "new_target": 86.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY), PSU Bank sector leader, near 52w high. Entry 81.50, CMP 79.03. SL at 75.50 (~5% below entry, below recent swing low 75.54). Target 86.00 gives R:R ~1:1.4 from entry but acceptable given sector momentum. Dilution overhang from Rs 7,500 cr capital raise warrants a tighter exit discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +26% QoQ), GNPA improved, JPM Overweight TP 1000. SL 935 (~5% below entry) below April 17 close of 923. Target 1080 near 52w high zone, R:R ~1:1.9. Housing finance tailwinds solid."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position. Entry 125.10, CMP 124.02. SL 119 (~5% below entry, near SMA20 121.92 with buffer). Target 135 aligns with prior highs. R:R ~1:1.6. Structural central bank buying thesis intact despite near-term dollar strength."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1575.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Power sector leader, 2.3x volume, broke out above prior 52w high 1640. Entry 1650, CMP 1672. SL 1575 below Apr 17 close 1565 (~4.5% below entry). Target 1820 gives R:R ~1:2.3. Nabha integration + Q4 on May 13 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best-in-decade Q4 print, FMCG defensive, debt-free. Entry 1412.94, CMP 1411. SL 1345 (~5% below entry, below breakout zone). Target 1500. R:R ~1:1.3 acceptable given quality. Rich valuation (P/E 72x) caps aggressive targeting."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 25 (key catalyst in 2 days). Only SFB with universal bank approval. Strong provisional advances +25%. Entry 1049, CMP 1042. SL 995 (~5% below, above Apr 17 close 990). Target 1140. R:R ~1:1.7. Exit earlier if result disappoints."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 648.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 29 catalyst, USFDA cGMP audit completed, Amphetamine ER tentative approval. Entry 681, CMP 687.70. SL 648 (~5% below, at S1 pivot). Target 740 above 52w high 685 breakout. R:R ~1:1.8."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2255.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 30 — binary. FMCG defensive rotation. Entry 2372, CMP 2361. SL 2255 (~5% below entry, below Apr 20 close 2231). Target 2550 near Jefferies TP range. R:R ~1:1.6. Bar raised by Nestle — tight risk management."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power play. Entry 404.50, CMP 403.35. SL 385 (~4.8% below, below SMA20 378). Target 435 near 52w high. R:R ~1:1.6. Summer demand tailwind, but 1Y -15% underperformance caps conviction."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "I have an existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 214 placed earlier. Stock is now at 216.70 — my limit will not fill unless there is a pullback. Bernstein TP 177 is BELOW CMP, Q3 PAT -19% YoY, and stock is +35% in April alone (stretched). Power/IPP cluster already represented via TORNTPOWER and NTPC. Do NOT stack another order; letting the existing LIMIT work. If it doesn't fill by EOD, will cancel next cycle."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.50,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 + sector momentum. SL set below recent swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "reasoning": "Bullish catalyst intact post-earnings. SL below Apr 17 close."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor. SL near SMA20 with buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1575.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to new 52w high. SL below recent swing, riding momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4, but rich valuation warrants tight SL below breakout zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 2 days — binary. Tight SL given event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 648.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high on 3.7x volume — institutional accumulation. SL at S1 pivot."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2255.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 on Apr 30. Tight SL given Nestle's high bar."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive utility, summer demand tailwind. SL below SMA20."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INFY: monitor post-result reaction tonight (4:30 PM press con). If guidance disappoints like HCLTECH, avoid. If in-line to beat, possible reversal trade tomorrow with tight SL. HCLTECH: falling knife — avoid until stabilization near 1250 with bullish reversal candle. AUROPHARMA: buyback at 1475 vs CMP 1427 is arbitrage-only play; not enough upside for swing. MANAPPURAM: Bain co-promoter is a structural positive but already +9% today; wait for pullback to 280. ADANIENSOL/PIRAMALFIN/ELECON/DEEPAKNTR: chasing gap-ups is low-edge, skip. AXISBANK: results Apr 25, stock already at top of broker TP range — no favorable R:R.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 74% deployed with only 6% remaining deployable (Rs 64k). Nine CNC positions all entered today at ~breakeven. Cluster exposure check: Financials cluster = MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK = ~Rs 270k (~27% of book) — at cluster limit, NO MORE financial adds. Power cluster = TORNTPOWER + NTPC + pending ADANIPOWER if fills = ~Rs 160k (~16%) — acceptable. FMCG cluster = NESTLE + HUL = ~Rs 167k (~17%). Priority this cycle was installing SLs/targets on every held position since they were all at 0.00 — risk was uncapped. Next tick: evaluate trailing SLs on winners (TORNTPOWER, MAHABANK) and consider canceling stale ADANIPOWER limit if unfilled."
}
